data: Jharkhand Academic Council (JAC), Ranchi has released the notification for Jharkhand Teacher Eligibility Test (JHTET) 2026. Candidates who are interested can apply online from 21 April 2026 to 21 May 2026. Read full notification for eligibility, syllabus, age limit and other details.

Important Dates:
• Application Begin: 21/04/2026
• Last Date: 21/05/2026
• Fee Payment Last Date: 21/05/2026
• Exam Date: As per schedule
• Admit Card: Before Exam
• Answer Key: After Exam
• Result: Notified Soon

Payment Mode:
• Debit Card
• Credit Card
• Net Banking
• Offline Mode

Primary Level (Class 1–5) Eligibility:
• 10+2 with 50% marks + D.El.Ed
• 10+2 with 45% marks + D.El.Ed (as per NCTE rules)
• 10+2 with 50% marks + B.El.Ed
• 10+2 with 50% marks + Diploma in Special Education
• Graduation + D.El.Ed

Junior Level (Class 6–8) Eligibility:
• Graduation + D.El.Ed
• Graduation with 50% + B.Ed
• Graduation with 45% + B.Ed (NCTE rules)
• 10+2 with 50% + B.El.Ed / B.A.Ed / B.Sc.Ed
• Graduation with 50% + B.Ed (Special Education)
• Master Degree with 55% + B.Ed-M.Ed

Important Instructions:
• Read full notification before applying
• Keep documents ready (Photo, Signature, ID proof)
• Fill form carefully and check preview
• Pay fee to complete form
• Take printout of final form
